title: ixeridium strigosum
intro: Ixeridium strigosum, also known as prairie goldenrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the aster family that grows in various parts of North America. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ixeridium strigosum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Ixeridium strigosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the leaves and roots typically dried or fresh for use in herbal remedies.
